title: orchis sambucina var. laurentina
intro: Orchis sambucina var. laurentina, also known as the Autumn Lady's Tresses, is a perennial orchid plant that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Orchis sambucina var. laurentina include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into a tincture or infusion, or used in ointments and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
